notes: Non-transferable tokens cannot be sent from Phantom; send button is disabled
Phantom displays transfer-hook tokens but shows a warning banner to the user
Phantom shows transfer fee info in the send UI; user confirms before sending
Phantom flags permanent delegate in token detail view as a risk indicator
Phantom may display the token but confidential balances may not render correctly
Day 2 first-cut rules; Phantom wallet behavior sourced from public docs and community reports
